command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$lockedDate nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Phiếu yêu cầu kiểm kê %s đã có trong yêu cầu kiểm kê.' else N'The stocktaking requisition %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Phiếu yêu cầu kiểm kê %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the stocktaking requisition %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Phiếu yêu cầu kiểm kê %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the stocktaking requisition %s. It has already been used.' end
select convert(varchar(19), datetime2, 121) as cookie from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec return
insert into kkycct select * from @kkycct insert into kkycbkk select * from @kkycbkk select @stt_rec as stt_rec

&CheckLockDateBeforeProcess;
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @p varchar(4), @ex char(1), @message nvarchar(255), @voucherNumber varchar(32), @VoucherDate smalldatetime select @voucherNumber = so_ct, @VoucherDate = ngay_ct from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec
select @message = replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim(@voucherNumber)) &BeginCheckExists;'so_ct' as field, &ContinueCheckExists;'so_ct' as field, &NextCheckExists;'so_ct' as field, &EndCheckExists; if @so_ct <> @voucherNumber begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where so_ct = @so_ct and stt_rec <> @stt_rec) begin select 'so_ct' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@so_ct)) as message return end end
update @kkycct set stt_rec = @stt_rec update @kkycbkk set stt_rec = @stt_rec if $kkycct.NewValue <> $kkycct.OldValue delete kkycct where stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue if $kkycbkk.NewValue <> $kkycbkk.OldValue delete kkycbkk where stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue

if $kkycct.NewValue <> $kkycct.OldValue insert into kkycct select * from @kkycct if $kkycbkk.NewValue <> $kkycbkk.OldValue insert into kkycbkk select * from @kkycbkk
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec
